allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('reset ok, task:', d['observation']['task_id']\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8765/step -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"task_id":"task_easy","action":{"severity":"critical","inline_comments":[{"line_number":4,"comment":"None dereference"}],"summary":"null bug","approve":false}}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('step reward:', d['reward'], 'done:', d['done']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' -', t['task_id'], t['difficulty']\) for t in d['tasks']]" kill %1)
